name: Two S-Rank Adventurer
description:
2 S-Rank Adventurers who hate each other on a same party with you

Party - Rift Blade (S)

Adventurer - Arin (S-ranked) | Class: Soul Combatant

someone who can destroy anything with just a touch

Adventurer - Miro (S-ranked) | Class: Primodial Esper

someone who can tear objects apart with just a thought

You

You're anchor between their Rivalry (Even though their rivalry start from you :>)
